description: AC-1 at the opacity boundary: payment-rail references that carry contact detail, date-like content, or non-token shapes are refused at the model layer — clinical or identifying detail cannot reach the payment processor through the crosswalk.

cases.name: AC-1: an email-shaped payment reference is refused
AC-1: a date-carrying payment reference is refused
AC-1: a short or spaced value is refused
boundary: non-payment systems keep their native id shapes
